backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing a Harry Potter marketplace with item listings, shopping cart, messaging, user profiles, and role-based access control using mixins for authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented profile-related features including profile page creation, active listings display, seller navigation links, React Query hooks, and header navigation integration.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-line summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and configuration for the magical wizarding-themed marketplace application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a light and dark theme using OKLCH color space with neutral grays and accent colors for the UI components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Harry Potter Marketplace application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes (browse, cart, profile, listings, messaging), theme provider, profile setup modal for new users, and toast notifications.
Button component that adds items to cart using React Query mutation with loading state, error handling for own-item prevention, and success toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/CartIcon.tsx: Shopping cart icon button with badge showing item count, links to cart page, and fetches cart data using React Query.
frontend/src/components/ContactSellerBut: Button component that navigates to conversation page with specified seller ID for initiating messaging.
frontend/src/components/CreateListingFor: Form component for creating item listings with image upload, progress tracking, validation, all item fields (title, description, price, condition, category), and React Query mutation integration.
frontend/src/components/FilterPanel.tsx: A filter panel component for browsing items with dropdowns for category (with preview images), condition, and price range inputs. Accepts filter values and change handlers as props.
frontend/src/components/HeroBanner.tsx: A hero banner component displaying a large header image with gradient overlay and text promoting the wizarding marketplace. Static presentation component with no props.
frontend/src/components/ItemCard.tsx: A card component displaying an item with image, title, price, category badge, and condition. Links to item detail page and seller profile with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header containing logo, navigation links (browse, profile, sell, listings, messages, cart), authentication button, and renders children. Handles login/logout and conditional navigation based on authentication and seller status.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for new users to set up their profile with name (required), email (optional), and seller status checkbox. Cannot be dismissed and saves profile via mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A simple search input component with a search icon that accepts a value and onChange handler for filtering items.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state. Initializes access control with admin token and invalidates dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality. Creates AuthClient with configuration, manages identity state, and exposes login status and identity to child components via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, item listings (CRUD), shopping cart, messaging, and browsing. Manages query caching and invalidation using @tanstack/react-query.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme color schemes and typography using Cinzel (headings) and Inter (body) fonts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/BrowsePage.tsx: Main marketplace browsing page with search, filtering (category, condition, price), and grid display of items using ItemCard components.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with quantity controls, removal functionality, and total price calculation with checkout navigation.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page with shipping information form that clears cart on submission and simulates order placement (no actual payment processing).
frontend/src/pages/ConversationPage.tsx: Direct messaging interface between users showing conversation history with real-time message sending and auto-scrolling to latest messages.
frontend/src/pages/CreateListingPage.tsx: Page component that allows authenticated sellers to create new item listings. Displays alerts if user is not logged in or not registered as a seller, otherwise renders the CreateListingForm component.
frontend/src/pages/InboxPage.tsx: Displays a user's message inbox with conversation previews grouped by other user, sorted by most recent message. Shows empty state if no messages exist and requires authentication to access.
frontend/src/pages/ItemDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed information about a single item listing including image, price, description, condition, category, and seller information. Provides add-to-cart and contact-seller buttons for non-owners.
frontend/src/pages/MyListingsPage.tsx: Shows authenticated user's own item listings in a grid layout with delete functionality. Displays empty state with create listing prompt if no listings exist.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Displays a user's public profile including name, email, seller badge, and their active listings. Shows profile header with avatar and member-since date.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing. Includes sessionStorage persistence helpers for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, custom fonts (Inter, Cinzel), magical shadow effects, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting a Harry Potter-themed marketplace application with features including Internet Identity authentication, item listings, search/filtering, shopping cart, messaging system, and wizarding-themed UI design at version 5.
